name: Denied Slip and Fall Claim in West Jordan What Next

mainEntity.name: What if my employer denies my slip and fall claim in West Jordan Utah?
mainEntity.text: What if my employer denies my slip and fall claim in West Jordan Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: If denied in West Jordan file an objection with Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice. Request hearing for medical exam and evidence review to overturn.[6]

suggestedAnswer.text: Denials often cite untimely report or non-work related. Gather witness statements medical records and incident reports. Commission mediators help but attorneys boost success rates. Appeals go to district court if lost. Local firms like Just Work Comp specialize avoiding lowball offers from insurers.[6]
